title: Michigan steps up work to persuade young men to go to college, get skills training
summary_en: Michigan is among the top states where young men’s college enrollment has plummeted.
author: Kim Kozlowski
title_cn: Michigan steps up work to persuade young men to go to college, get skills training

title: Detroit schools make gains in reading and math: 4 strategies that work
summary_en: A new study singles out Detroit as one of the districts nationally that is ‘accelerating recovery.’ How the schools did it — and what more needs to be done
author: Lily Altavena, Chalkbeat
title_cn: Detroit schools make gains in reading and math: 4 strategies that work
